case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. JIN YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AN, JIN YOUNG INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA LADERA HEIGHTS CLEANERS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ( $ 291.00 IS THE INTEREST ) SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE PROPERTY EQUIPMENT AND VALUE., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $291.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $10,626.99 DAMAGES, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,176.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-18-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
